title: Recursive Coding Agents - Raymond Weitekamp, OpenProse
summary: Raymond Weitekamp discusses Recursive Language Models and how inference-time compute patterns can be applied to coding agents to improve performance and reliability. The talk explores the technical mechanisms underlying recursive approaches in AI systems.
